channel.title: Virtualization on Kunal Kushwaha
channel.description: Recent content in Virtualization on Kunal Kushwaha

item.title: Container Virtualization and its building blocks
item.description: Since 2014, Linux containers have become buzz word in Cloud Infrastructure. Almost all, from Big corporations to startups, all have started using it. Huge credit goes to Docker for making using containers so easy to use.

item.title: Layman guide to Platform Virtualization
item.description:
Platform Virtualization!

Virtualization is not new in Computer World today. But when I am asked what I am working on, I say “Cloud Infrastructure and trying to build a private Cloud Platform!”.
